# **DESIGN REQUIREMENTS DOCUMENT (DRD)**

## **🟢 1\. System Overview**

### **Product Name:**

**CineMatch – Movie Recommendation System**

### **System Type:**

* Web-based application  
* ML-powered recommendation system

### **Purpose:**

To provide **personalized movie recommendations** using a hybrid ML model with a modern, interactive UI.

---

# **🏗️ 2\. Design Architecture**

## **🔹 Architecture Style:**

**Three-Tier Architecture**

### **Layers:**

### **1\. Presentation Layer (Frontend)**

* UI screens (your screenshots)  
* Handles:  
  * User interaction  
  * Input collection  
  * Display results

### **2\. Application Layer (Backend)**

* Flask server  
* Handles:  
  * Business logic  
  * ML model execution  
  * API calls

### **3\. Data Layer**

* MovieLens dataset  
* TMDB API  
* SQLite database  
* Trained ML models (.pkl)

---

# **🧠 3\. System Components**

## **🔹 Core Modules**

### **1\. User Module**

* Authentication (login/signup)  
* Profile management

### **2\. Recommendation Engine**

* Content-Based Engine  
* Collaborative Engine  
* Hybrid Engine  
* Personalization Engine

### **3\. Data Processing Module**

* Cleaning  
* Feature engineering  
* Encoding

### **4\. API Integration Module**

* TMDB API for:  
  * Posters  
  * Metadata

---

# **🔄 4\. System Workflow Design**

### **Step-by-step Flow:**

1. User logs in  
2. Sets preferences  
3. Selects filters / movie  
4. Backend processes:  
   * Content similarity  
   * Collaborative prediction  
   * Personalization  
5. Hybrid score calculated  
6. Top-N movies displayed

---

# **🎨 5\. UI/UX Design Requirements**

## **🔥 Based on your screenshots:**

**![https://images.openai.com/static-rsc-4/StqdZDzum2aU3Ch1dCdrYN\_l0kxgKoOcjlm82PSjh1JZ3VI0NA5SS54RaI67KVvvwwOvEzJjK3tJ7cinY1M0gfY1dFfmnpM7YRk-Doj9ANVNoQpQ0SinKmWyI0OohnZjSKYKQIGElFCVChShwN8EmR5M-vKIP6NA9wRPOafxeacjEIsKuV2d3U1q68lEIxa3?purpose=fullsize][image1]**  
**![https://images.openai.com/static-rsc-4/7eFklUYJVxcLPUGZ4sGR6BFFlF2LNob1DH6RdKpzIcLORlMbK3OI-OlkFyw2NYoQJSA\_1TMEwnK04iODhv7wzzXH9ONIEyc\_-bgU0IoHhC0lPNAXxd0lukkcIH0EPxutwXj3o62XTiwgccTEyPcpzAMOvNpOZrgEbISmYh7xnP6JxDDyquX35vT77fSMzaUE?purpose=fullsize][image2]**  
**![https://images.openai.com/static-rsc-4/gW856vcT45gfYGARWp5IVeiDRJUryfSHowW2mzs0v8XL\_jqlFFRp7-DwlnygCJoPDxbVedqae24ltbzgzMp-7IxLyxWr8b5T3Zj\_lyU07C7sSStRbwGjjM3AuivVeBLBN5iq91JqVcZlYAR7vlxvRaq9fbybg6GfVTWvagRbWQLNf3kBrbSjfrbAA1Ufaygo?purpose=fullsize][image3]**  
6  
---

## **🎯 Design Theme**

* Dark theme (Netflix-inspired)  
* Accent color: **Red**  
* Clean card-based layout

---

## **📱 Screens Identified**

### **1\. Login Page**

* Username \+ password  
* CTA: “Sign In”

### **2\. Profile Page**

* User info  
* Editable fields

### **3\. Preferences Page**

* Genre selection (chips UI)  
* Age & gender

### **4\. Filters Page**

* Era dropdown  
* Rating dropdown  
* Optional movie input

### **5\. Recommendation Page**

* Movie cards grid  
* Poster \+ title \+ rating

### **6\. Movie Detail Modal**

* Poster  
* Description  
* Scores:  
  * Content score  
  * Collaborative score  
  * Persona score

---

## **🧩 UI Components**

* Buttons (Primary: Red CTA)  
* Cards (movie display)  
* Dropdowns  
* Chips (genre selection)  
* Modals (movie details)  
* Navbar

---

# **⚙️ 6\. Functional Design**

## **🔹 Recommendation Formula**

HybridScore \=  
 0.5 × ContentScore \+  
 0.3 × CollaborativeScore \+  
 0.2 × PersonalizationScore  
---

## **🔹 Content-Based Design**

* TF-IDF vectorization  
* Cosine similarity

---

## **🔹 Collaborative Design**

* User-item matrix  
* Truncated SVD

---

## **🔹 Personalization Design**

* Age-based scoring  
* Gender affinity  
* Genre preferences

---

# **🗂️ 7\. Database Design**

## **Tables:**

### **Users Table**

* user\_id  
* username  
* email  
* password\_hash  
* age  
* gender  
* preferred\_genres

### **Movies Table**

* movie\_id  
* title  
* genres  
* rating  
* metadata

### **Ratings Table**

* user\_id  
* movie\_id  
* rating

---

# **🔐 8\. Security Design**

* Password hashing (Werkzeug)  
* Session-based authentication  
* Input validation  
* Secure API calls

---

# **⚡ 9\. Performance Design**

### **Requirements:**

* Response time \< 2 seconds  
* Efficient similarity computation  
* Pre-trained models

### **Optimizations:**

* Use `.pkl` models  
* Cache frequent queries  
* Limit Top-N results

---

# **📈 10\. Scalability Design**

Future-ready for:

* Cloud deployment (AWS/GCP)  
* Microservices architecture  
* Real-time recommendation updates

---

# **🚨 11\. Constraints**

* Cold-start problem  
* Sparse data  
* Limited real-time updates

---

# **🚀 12\. Future Design Improvements**

* Deep learning recommender  
* Real-time streaming data  
* Mobile app  
* Advanced UI animations
